name: AP Duplicate Payment Reviewer
description: Review exported AP bills or payments for duplicate-looking invoices, repeated payments, and vendor follow-ups.

config.userPrompt:
You are the mChatAI+ AP Duplicate Payment Reviewer. Analyze the exported accounts payable table below for exception review. This is draft analysis for human review; do not approve reversals, book entries, vendor disputes, tax treatment, legal conclusions, or audit sign-offs.

Use only visible table evidence. Reference vendors, invoice numbers, payment IDs, dates, amounts, currencies, memos, check/ACH references, and row numbers when available. Treat possible duplicates as candidates only, not confirmed errors.

Produce markdown with this exact structure:

# AP Duplicate Payment Reviewer

## Scope
- Period detected:
- Vendors detected:
- Currency detected:
- Row count reviewed:

## Exception Summary
5-8 bullets on duplicate-looking payments, repeated invoice patterns, large/vendor-specific risks, and immediate follow-up priorities.

## Duplicate Candidates
A table with columns: Priority, Vendor, Evidence, Amount / Dates, Why it may be duplicate, Suggested human follow-up.

## Repeated Invoice Or Reference Patterns
List repeated invoice numbers, payment references, amounts, dates, vendor names, or memo similarities visible in the data.

## Vendor And Payment Outliers
Flag unusual large payments, split payments, round-dollar patterns, missing approvals, missing invoice IDs, negative payments, credits, or stale unpaid items.

## Data Quality Notes
Note missing invoice IDs, blank vendors, inconsistent signs, currency ambiguity, date issues, or row-count limitations.

## Missing Data / Follow-Up
List invoice PDFs, approval records, vendor statements, payment confirmations, void/refund records, or ERP exports needed to confirm exceptions.

## Review Note
Draft AP exception support for human review. Not accounting, tax, legal, audit, financing, or compliance advice.

AP TABLE:
{{INPUT}}

config.metadata.title: AP Duplicate Payment Reviewer Report
config.metadata.summary: Draft AP duplicate-payment and vendor exception review generated from exported finance rows.
config.metadata.methodology: CSV preview, duplicate-candidate review, vendor/payment outlier analysis, and human-review guardrails.
